message:
refactor(robot): extract GetContext for CLI/REST parity

Refactor PrintContext to extract GetContext function that returns the
data struct directly instead of printing JSON.

Changes:
- Add GetContext(session, lines) -> (*ContextOutput, error)
- PrintContext now calls GetContext and encodes the result

This enables the REST API to share the same context logic without
going through JSON encoding/decoding, improving consistency between
CLI and API responses.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
